mechanics.excerpt: ESCAPE ARTIST The Escape Artist Skill is used to break free of personal restraints and bindings from simple rope to handcuffs and straitjackets It can also aid characters in escaping from impris onment similar large-scale entrapment: Successful Escape Artist Action Checks enable characters t0 squeeze between cell bars tunnel under walls steal guard'$ keys slip out restraints and SO on. However; the Skill does not aid characters attempting to pick locks or defeat security cameras_ These tasks are covered by the Security Systems Skill (p. 105).
